alignments.preprint_claim_text: A large synthetic data set is being generated using physically accurate models and machine learning. (certainty=medium, type=contribution)
alignments.pub_claim_text: A large synthetic data set is being generated using physically accurate models and machine learning algorithms. (certainty=medium, type=contribution)
alignments.rationale: Both versions report generation of a large synthetic dataset; the publication slightly rewords the methods (adds 'algorithms') but does not change the claim.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The proposed Self-building Neural Network (SBNN) performs generally better than traditional neural networks (NNs) over three classical control tasks from OpenAI. (certainty=high, type=result)
alignments.pub_claim_text: The proposed Self-building Neural Network (SBNN) model performs generally better than traditional feed forward neural networks (FFNNs). (certainty=high, type=result)

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The performance decay while increasing the pruning rate is smaller in the SBNN model than with traditional NNs. (certainty=high, type=result)
alignments.pub_claim_text: The performance decay while increasing the pruning rate is smaller in the SBNN model than with FFNNs. (certainty=high, type=result)

alignments.preprint_claim_text: SBNNs can adapt to new tasks better than traditional NNs, especially when over 80% of the weights are pruned. (certainty=high, type=result)
alignments.rationale: The specific claim about adaptation to new tasks and the >80% pruning condition does not appear among the publication claims and is therefore marked removed.

alignments.pub_claim_text: The SBNN model simulates the synaptogenesis process through a combination of Hebbian Learning and pruning. (certainty=medium, type=contribution)
alignments.rationale: The publication adds a mechanistic/biological inspiration claim about synaptogenesis that was not present in the preprint.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The proposed Chg2Cap network effectively generates accurate captions for bi-temporal remote sensing images. (certainty=high, type=result)
alignments.pub_claim_text: The proposed attentive changes-to-captions network, Chg2Cap, effectively addresses the challenge of generating accurate captions for bi-temporal remote sensing images. (certainty=high, type=result)

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The study highlights the importance of accurately describing changes in remote sensing images for geospatial understanding and land planning. (certainty=high, type=conclusion)
alignments.pub_claim_text: The study highlights the significance of accurately describing changes in remote sensing images. (certainty=high, type=conclusion)
alignments.rationale: The publication retains the same conclusion but slightly shortens wording; the core point is preserved though some application phrasing (land planning) is omitted, so treated as a clarification.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: Chg2Cap utilizes a Siamese CNN-based feature extractor and an attentive decoder to enhance the change captioning process. (certainty=medium, type=contribution)
alignments.pub_claim_text: Chg2Cap includes a Siamese CNN-based feature extractor, an attentive encoder, and a transformer-based caption generator. (certainty=medium, type=contribution)

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The change captioning task for remote sensing images differs from natural image change captioning by focusing on significant changes regardless of various influential factors. (certainty=medium, type=conclusion)

alignments.pub_claim_text: The performance of the Chg2Cap network is evaluated on two representative remote sensing datasets. (certainty=medium, type=result)
alignments.rationale: The evaluation-on-datasets claim appears in the publication but was not present among the listed preprint claims, so it is an added publication claim.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The proposed method, DynamoPMU, effectively separates linear dynamical behavior patterns from anomalous events in sequential data. (certainty=high, type=result)
alignments.pub_claim_text: The method separates linear dynamical behavior patterns from intermittent forcing, which includes anomalous events. (certainty=medium, type=conclusion)
alignments.rationale: The publication reframes 'anomalous events' as 'intermittent forcing' but preserves the core claim that linear dynamics are separated from such events, so this is a clarification.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: DynamoPMU demonstrates efficacy in detecting anomalies and predicting events in real-time using $\text{PMU}$ data. (certainty=high, type=result)

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The approach is suitable for unsupervised event detection and adapts to varying statistics in the electrical distribution system. (certainty=medium, type=conclusion)

alignments.pub_claim_text: Fides achieves an accuracy of up to 98% for attack detection. (certainty=high, type=result)

alignments.pub_claim_text: Fides features a novel and efficient distillation technique called Greedy Distillation Transfer Learning. (certainty=medium, type=contribution)
alignments.rationale: Contribution description is identical between preprint and publication.

alignments.pub_claim_text: Fides includes a client-side attack detection model that uses statistical analysis and divergence measurements. (certainty=medium, type=contribution)

alignments.pub_claim_text: The projective group’s nonlinear magnification of information transformed epistemic value according to the choice of frame, generating behaviors of approach toward objects with uncertain locations due to limited sampling. (certainty=high, type=result)

alignments.pub_claim_text: We formally demonstrate and simulate how the groups induce distinct behaviors in a simple search task. (certainty=high, type=result)

alignments.pub_claim_text: The Euclidean group had no effect on epistemic value: no action was better than the initial idle state. (certainty=high, type=result)

alignments.pub_claim_text: The proposed model-based algorithm achieves $\tilde{O}(LX\sqrt{TA})$ regret with high probability. (certainty=high, type=result)

alignments.pub_claim_text: The proposed algorithm achieves a tighter regret bound compared to existing works that use a similar confidence set framework. (certainty=high, type=result)

alignments.pub_claim_text: The paper highlights the promising potential of ML-based force-field models for dynamical simulations of functional electronic materials.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: Users do not consider themselves the owners and authors of AI-generated text but refrain from publicly declaring AI authorship.
alignments.pub_claim_text: Users do not consider themselves the owners and authors of AI-generated text but refrain from publicly declaring AI authorship.
alignments.rationale: The ownership/authorship and public-declaration behaviors are stated identically in both versions.

alignments.pub_claim_text: Personalization of AI-generated texts did not impact the AI Ghostwriter Effect.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: Participants were more likely to attribute ownership to supposedly human ghostwriters than AI ghostwriters.
alignments.pub_claim_text: Participants were more likely to attribute ownership to supposedly human ghostwriters than AI ghostwriters, resulting in a higher ownership-authorship discrepancy for human ghostwriters.
alignments.rationale: The publication retains the core result but adds the consequence (higher ownership-authorship discrepancy), expanding the reported implications.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: Rationalizations for authorship in AI ghostwriters and human ghostwriters were similar.
alignments.pub_claim_text: Rationalizations for authorship in AI ghostwriters and human ghostwriters were similar.
alignments.rationale: The conclusion about similarity of rationalizations is preserved with the same certainty.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: Quantum neural networks can approximate the distribution of their dataset with a truncated Fourier series under certain conditions.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: Angle-embedded quantum neural networks may struggle to fit non-harmonic features in a dataset.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The introduced hybrid quantum neural networks improve the interpretability of neural networks.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The parallel hybrid network architecture improves solution optimality on periodic datasets with additional noise.
alignments.pub_claim_text: The training results indicate that parallel hybrid network architecture can improve solution optimality on periodic datasets with additional noise.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The paper discusses the subtleties behind the evaluation of visual place recognition algorithms.
alignments.rationale: Discussion of evaluation subtleties from the preprint is not present as an explicit claim in the publication.

alignments.pub_claim_text: The proposed anomaly detection method for time series data demonstrates superior performance in anomaly detection tasks.

alignments.pub_claim_text: The framework jointly learns the observation model and the dynamic model while estimating model uncertainty from normal samples.

alignments.pub_claim_text: It is important to account for model complexity when designing deep learning based models for interference classification.
